network_summary: Dr. Jianjun Hao, DDS MS PhD, is an orthodontist and dentist who personally owns and operates three professional corporations under the 'Smiling Dental' brand family in Chicagoland: Pacific Smiling Dental P.C. (Aurora 60504, primary/flagship), Smiling Dental International P.C. (Chicago 60619), and Pulaski Smiling Dental P.C. (Chicago 60629). He is listed as PRESIDENT or OWNER on all three NPPES records. No MSO, management company, DSO platform, or PE sponsor has been found. The 'Destiny Dental / ProSmile' label previously applied to the 87th St location (55404df201ad194f) appears to be a mislabel from the 2026-05-30 seeding — no public source connects that practice to Destiny Dental or ProSmile; the authorized official, legal entity name, and website all point to Dr. Hao's own private group. This is a dentist-owned multi-office private group with no third-party management layer.

evidence_chain: AO signal: JIANJUN HAO appears as authorized official (PRESIDENT/OWNER) on 3 org-NPIs across ZIPs 60504, 60619, 60629. Documentary corroboration: (1) smilingdentalgroup.com is Dr. Hao's public-facing multi-office brand website listing the Aurora practice; (2) npino.com records confirm his AO title and role as OWNER/PRESIDENT on all three NPIs; (3) LinkedIn identifies him as Founder of Smiling Dental International P.C.; (4) All three legal-entity names share 'Smiling Dental' branding plus 'P.C.' suffix. No MSO, management-company, or PE-platform document found. The Destiny/ProSmile DB label on the 87th St location is a prior-session seeding artifact with no corroborating web evidence.
future_app_notes: 1. The 87th St location (55404df) carries a dso_regional / Destiny Dental / ProSmile classification that appears FALSE. Downstream gate should revert it to independent (large_group or dso_regional based on provider_count=8) and clear affiliated_dso — unless new evidence emerges linking it to Destiny/ProSmile operationally. 2. This is the 'Smiling Dental Group — Pulaski backfill71 individual' network from a prior session; the present 3-location cluster is consistent with that linkage. 3. Dr. Hao also works as an orthodontist contractor at Orland Advanced Dentistry, Des Plaines, and Hoffman Estates offices — these are NOT his owned practices, just contracted orthodontic days; do not count them in his ownership network. 4. The Aurora practice (eea9dfd) is currently solo_high_volume (provider_count=1 per NPPES) despite the Smiling Dental Group website suggesting it is a multi-provider office; this may reflect that additional providers are on individual NPI-1 records not captured at the org level. 5. If provider_count at 712 E 87th (60619) truly = 8, this is a substantial clinic for a private dentist-owner — worth a follow-up NPPES deep dive to confirm none of the 8 providers are linked to Destiny Dental's actual TIN/EIN.
